name: M4A1消音版 | 暴怒野兽
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been custom painted with a beastly creature in psychedelic colors. You really want to impress me Booth? Make this black light sensitive - Rona Sabri, Rising Star
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使用残忍的生物的图案，搭配迷幻的颜色进行了涂装。 你真的的想给我留下深刻的印象吗布兹？用刺眼的黑光证明给我看吧 - 明日之星罗纳.萨布里
